name: Arjun Mehta
bio: Arjun has 18 years of experience in Indian real estate markets. He founded Advith Homes to bring transparency and expertise to every property transaction.

name: Kavitha Reddy
bio: Kavitha is a property law specialist with a decade of experience in title verification, agreement drafting, and RERA compliance. She ensures every deal is watertight.

name: Sameer Joshi
bio: Sameer specialises in Bengaluru's east and north corridors. He has helped over 300 families find their dream homes in the past five years.

name: Divya Pillai
bio: Divya has deep relationships with over 15 leading lenders and consistently secures below-market rates for our clients.

name: Rahul Shetty
bio: Rahul tracks micro-market data across Bengaluru and Hyderabad, producing research that helps investors make data-driven decisions.

name: Meena Thomas
bio: Meena is the first point of contact for all new enquiries and ensures every client has a smooth and responsive experience throughout their journey.
